---
title: ""
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: home-news
    contents: news/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    template: assets/listings/news-listing-scroll.ejs.md
    fields: [title, date, description, categories, path]
    max-items: 6

  - id: home-publications
    contents: publications/*/index.qmd
    sort:
      - "pub-status asc"
      - "date desc"
    template: assets/listings/pub-listing-scroll.ejs.md
    fields: [title, pub-year, pub-authors, venue, pub-status, pub-type, pdf, path]
    max-items: 6
---

::::::: hero-header
::: hero-logo
![](images/lablogo.png){alt="CALM Lab logo"}
:::

::::: hero-text
::: hero-title
CALM [LAB]{style="color: var(--color-yellow);"}
:::

::: hero-subtitle
Control of Attention in Life and Mind
:::
:::::
:::::::

::: hero-intro
The CALM Lab studies attention control across contexts of life and mind, combining cognitive science, neuroscience, and contemplative approaches to understand how attention shapes thought, success, and well-being.
:::

:::::::::::: {.grid-3 .section-shell}
::::: {.card .card-interactive .card-body .is-blue}
:::: quick-card-link
<a href="team/index.qmd">

::: {.icon-badge .icon-badge-sm}
<i class="bi bi-people"></i>
:::

### Team

Meet the researchers and students working in the CALM Lab.

[View Team →]{.link-cta}</a>
::::
:::::

::::: {.card .card-interactive .card-body .is-yellow}
:::: quick-card-link
<a href="projects/index.qmd">

::: {.icon-badge .icon-badge-sm}
<i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i>
:::

### Projects

Explore our research on attention control, brain networks, and mindfulness.

[View Projects →]{.link-cta}</a>
::::
:::::

::::: {.card .card-interactive .card-body .is-green}
:::: quick-card-link
<a href="contact.qmd">

::: {.icon-badge .icon-badge-sm}
<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
:::

### Connect

Interested in collaborating, joining the lab, or learning more about our work?

[Get in Touch →]{.link-cta}</a>
::::
:::::
::::::::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Latest News

::: {#home-news}
:::

::: listing-more
<a href="/news/" class="link-cta">View All News →</a>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Latest Publications

::: {#home-publications}
:::

::: listing-more
<a href="/publications/" class="link-cta">View All Publications →</a>
:::
